description.en: Escape to our cozy cabins nestled among lush greenery. Wake up to birdsong, sip fresh coffee on the porch, and let the tranquility of the farm restore your spirit.
description.my: Melarikan diri ke kabin kami yang selesa di tengah-tengah kehijauan. Bangun dengan kicauan burung, minum kopi segar di beranda, dan biarkan ketenangan ladang memulihkan semangat anda.
description.zh: 逃离喧嚣，入住郁郁葱葱中的温馨小屋。聆听鸟鸣声醒来，在门廊品一杯新鲜咖啡，让农场的宁静恢复您的活力。

slides.imageAlt: Cozy farmhouse cabin surrounded by lush tropical greenery at Uncle Voo's Farm

description.en: Browse our farm shop stocked with fresh seasonal produce, homemade preserves, and artisan goods. All grown and crafted right here on Uncle Voo's land.
description.my: Layari kedai ladang kami yang dipenuhi dengan hasil segar bermusim, jeruk buatan sendiri, dan barangan kraf. Semuanya ditanam dan dihasilkan di tanah Pak Voo.
description.zh: 浏览我们的农场商店，供应新鲜时令农产品、自制腌制品和手工商品，全部产自伍叔叔的土地。

slides.imageAlt: Fresh organic produce and seasonal harvest from Uncle Voo's Farm shop

description.en: Join an educational adventure through our working farm. Feed the animals, pick your own fruit, and discover the joy of sustainable farming. Perfect for families and curious minds.
description.my: Sertai pengembaraan pendidikan melalui ladang kami yang aktif. Beri makan haiwan, petik buah sendiri, dan temui kegembiraan pertanian lestari. Sesuai untuk keluarga dan minda yang ingin tahu.
description.zh: 参加我们农场的教育探险之旅，喂动物、自摘水果，探索可持续农业的乐趣，适合家庭和好奇心旺盛的人士。

slides.imageAlt: Family enjoying a guided farm tour at Uncle Voo's organic farm in Malaysia
